my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Generated annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3, which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; attempting to import javax.annotation.Generated results in a compilation error.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation import to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 / Java 17 environments; using it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).
